case_title: MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC VS. ACT WIRELESS LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC AS TO RESPONDENT ACT WIRELESS LLC WARREN, RICHARD E JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
MINI MINUTES FOR JAN-06-2016 09:30 AM FOR DEPT 302

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC RECOVER FROM RESPONDENT ACT WIRELESS LLC WARREN, RICHARD E $48,165.49 PRINCIPAL, $2,825.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,663.20 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $52,653.69, PETITIONER ENTITLED TO RECOVER POSSESSION OF PROPERTY. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition And Motion To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-06-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PETITIONER MAIN STREET BUSINESS LOANS, LLC'S Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed.

Judge: Ernest Goldsmith. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489. (302/EG)
